description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a casual urban outfit, featuring a long-sleeve jacket layered over a t-shirt, and camouflage-patterned pants. The figure wears sturdy lace-up boots suitable for walking on city streets. The hairstyle is medium-length and styled in thick, textured locks that fall to the shoulders. The facial features are neutral, and the hands are relaxed, with fingers slightly apart. The overall appearance suggests a modern, everyday city dweller prepared for outdoor activity.
description: A casually dressed adult with a jacket, camouflage pants, boots, and shoulder-length textured hair, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a modern urban look suitable for city environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, blue t-shirt under a jacket, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the side of the boots and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, boots, and the full length of the textured hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the outfit and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jacket over a t-shirt with camouflage-patterned pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
